mapper.select: SELECT id, diary_id, user_id, created_at FROM diary_favorites WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id, CASE WHEN t.invalid = 1 THEN '日记已失效' ELSE t.title END AS title, CASE WHEN t.invalid = 1 THEN NULL ELSE t.summary END AS summary, CASE WHEN t.invalid = 1 THEN NULL ELSE t.cover_url END AS cover_url, CASE WHEN t.invalid = 1 THEN NULL ELSE t.view_count END AS view_count, CASE WHEN t.invalid = 1 THEN 0 ELSE t.like_count END AS like_count, CASE WHEN t.invalid = 1 THEN 0 ELSE t.favorite_count END AS favorite_count, CASE WHEN t.invalid = 1 THEN 0 ELSE t.comment_count END AS comment_count, 0 AS liked, 1 AS favorited, CASE WHEN t.invalid = 1 THEN NULL ELSE t.published_at END AS published_at, t.invalid, CASE WHEN t.invalid = 1 THEN NULL ELSE t.author_id END AS author_id, CASE WHEN t.invalid = 1 THEN NULL ELSE t.author_nickname END AS author_nickname, CASE WHEN t.invalid = 1 THEN NULL ELSE t.author_avatar_url END AS author_avatar_url FROM ( SELECT f.diary_id AS id, d.title, d.summary, d.cover_url, d.view_count, d.like_count, d.favorite_count, d.comment_count, d.published_at, u.id AS author_id, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar_url AS author_avatar_url, CASE WHEN d.id IS NULL OR d.status <> 1 OR d.is_deleted <> 0 OR d.visibility <> 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS invalid, f.created_at, f.id AS favorite_id FROM diary_favorites f LEFT JOIN travel_diaries d ON f.diary_id = d.id LEFT JOIN users u ON d.user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ) t ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.favorite_id DESC
